self_assessment.strongest_at: ELF is strongest at governed, source-linked, reviewable memory and knowledge authority across Source Library, Memory Authority, Knowledge Workspace, graph-lite reports, Dreaming review queue, and recall/debug readback.

product_strengths.absorbed_by_elf: ELF recall/debug now exposes trace hydration, replay commands, candidate-drop visibility, and selected-but-not-narrated evidence in the operator-debug slice.
product_strengths.remains_stronger_elsewhere: qmd still has the default top-k JSON artifact and short local CLI replay edge; expansion, dense/sparse, fusion, and rerank attribution parity is not proven.
product_strengths.blocked_or_missing_adapter: Comparable qmd-style immediate candidate replay with expansion, fusion, rerank, and dropped-candidate details.

product_strengths.absorbed_by_elf: ELF Source Library has long-document source records, hydrated excerpts, source refs, and explicit same-corpus PageIndex blocker requirements.
product_strengths.remains_stronger_elsewhere: PageIndex remains the reference for vectorless long-document tree retrieval and PageIndex MCP direction.
product_strengths.blocked_or_missing_adapter: Contained PageIndex tree artifact, cited node paths, traversal output, MCP readback, and setup/runtime metadata mapped to ELF source ids.

product_strengths.absorbed_by_elf: ELF Knowledge Workspace has source-linked project/entity/concept/issue pages, stale lint, watch/rebuild, and version-diff readback.
product_strengths.remains_stronger_elsewhere: OpenKB remains the reference for compiled wiki export, saved exploration, concept/entity indexes, lint, watch, and recompile workflow.
product_strengths.blocked_or_missing_adapter: Contained OpenKB wiki export, entity/concept index export, lint output, saved exploration state, and watch/recompile trace mapped to ELF source ids.

product_strengths.absorbed_by_elf: The P3 slice maps mem0 SDK Memory.history, scoped search, and local get_all export-style output to source ids and keeps OpenMemory product evidence separate.
product_strengths.remains_stronger_elsewhere: mem0 remains stronger on explicit local SDK ADD, UPDATE, DELETE history readback; OpenMemory remains the product UI/export reference.
product_strengths.blocked_or_missing_adapter: OpenMemory product container, app database export, browser/API/export-helper readback, hosted Platform evidence, and optional graph memory remain unproven.

product_strengths.absorbed_by_elf: The P3 slice names ELF core-block and archival source ids that a contained Letta export/readback must map before scoring.
product_strengths.remains_stronger_elsewhere: Letta remains the reference for core/archive memory product modeling and export/readback shape.
product_strengths.blocked_or_missing_adapter: Exported Letta core block JSON, archival passage/readback/search JSON, visibility/provenance metadata, and source ids.

product_strengths.absorbed_by_elf: The Graphiti/Zep fixture now names current facts, historical facts, provider boundary evidence, and the blocked trace stage.
product_strengths.remains_stronger_elsewhere: Graphiti/Zep remains the temporal graph validity reference; hosted Zep and provider-backed graph quality are not proven locally.
product_strengths.blocked_or_missing_adapter: Provider-backed Graphiti search output that maps current and historical facts to validity windows and same-corpus source ids.

product_strengths.absorbed_by_elf: The context-trajectory fixtures expose same-corpus, hierarchy, recursive-expansion, rejected-sibling, decoy, and comparison gates as typed blockers.
product_strengths.remains_stronger_elsewhere: OpenViking remains the reference for filesystem-like context URIs, hierarchy selection, staged retrieval trajectory, and recursive expansion.
product_strengths.blocked_or_missing_adapter: Comparable same-corpus staged artifacts, selected hierarchy nodes, rejected siblings or decoys, pruned branches, and expansion paths.

product_strengths.absorbed_by_elf: The adapter matrix turns RAGFlow retrieval, citation, navigation, stale-source, faithfulness, and knowledge-compilation expectations into explicit rows.
product_strengths.remains_stronger_elsewhere: RAGFlow remains a document-processing and RAG workflow reference; no same-corpus quality pass exists.
product_strengths.blocked_or_missing_adapter: Answer text and selected reference chunks with document ids, chunk ids, content, metadata, and stale-source outputs mapped to evidence ids.

product_strengths.absorbed_by_elf: The adapter matrix names output-table, citation, graph/community navigation, faithfulness, and stale-source requirements without claiming parity.
product_strengths.remains_stronger_elsewhere: GraphRAG remains the reference for graph-oriented retrieval, community reports, and graph summary synthesis.
product_strengths.blocked_or_missing_adapter: Mapped documents, text_units, communities, reports, entities, relationships, local-search answers, and unsupported/stale claim lint.

product_strengths.absorbed_by_elf: The adapter matrix records context/source reference, retrieval, navigation, faithfulness, stale-source, and knowledge-compilation coverage gaps.
product_strengths.remains_stronger_elsewhere: LightRAG remains the lightweight graph/RAG architecture reference; context export is incomplete in the current evidence.
product_strengths.blocked_or_missing_adapter: Opt-in Docker API output with context, file paths, snippets, source references, and answer checking mapped to evidence ids.

p4_optimization_queue.scope: Emit comparable immediate candidate replay artifacts with expansion, dense/sparse, fusion, rerank, dropped evidence, and one-command replay lines.
Harden public comparison grammar, typed outcomes, expected evidence recall, irrelevant context ratio, unsupported-claim counts, and resource metrics.
Materialize PageIndex tree artifacts and OpenKB wiki/index/lint/watch outputs over the same corpus.
Harden mem0/OpenMemory history/export comparison and Letta core/archive export/readback mapping.
Materialize Graphiti/Zep temporal validity, OpenViking trajectory, and RAGFlow/GraphRAG/LightRAG citation/navigation artifacts.

allowed: ELF is strongest at governed source-linked memory and knowledge authority in the checked-in evidence.
P3 absorbed competitor strengths into ELF-owned evidence surfaces, same-corpus blockers, and P4 optimization inputs.
The P4 optimization queue is ready for main-thread inspection after this closeout passes self-assessment.
not_allowed: Typed non-pass states are not wins.
Do not claim ELF broadly beats qmd, PageIndex, OpenKB, mem0/OpenMemory, Letta, Graphiti/Zep, OpenViking, RAGFlow, GraphRAG, or LightRAG.
Do not claim private-corpus, hosted, provider-backed, UI/export, graph/RAG, or core/archive parity from fixture-only, blocked, incomplete, wrong-result, or not-encoded evidence.
Do not apply decodex:queued:elf to a P4 issue until the main thread accepts the P3 closeout.
